Rupa; if it is Scorpio, the strength is i-Rupa; if any of the rest,
the strength is | Rupa. The strength of the Ascendant is equal to
the total strength of its lord. If that lord occupies an Upacaya
house (3, 6, 10 or 11), the Lagna will attain great strength.
The same effect accrues to it when it is occupied or
aspected by its lord. Mercury or Jupiter and when conjoined
with Venus and without the aspect or conjunction of other

PLANETARY STRENGTH 39
planets. For day-births the diurnal Signs are strong and for
night-births the nocturnal ones.
I have mentioned above that to be posited in Kendras is a
matter of considerable strength for planets. Among the four
Kendras the Lagna-Kendra is the strongest, next in importance
is the 7th, next to that is the 10th and last is the 4th which is
called Patala or Netherworld. You might remember the two
kinds of friendship etc. existing among the planets, natural and
temporary. Of these the former is more powerful and lasting.
